productDisplayName: Lotto Men's TNG Blue Flip Flop
description: flip flops are the coolest style of footwear you can ever own, and what can get even better than a stylish comfortable pair. Understanding your need for such fantabulous footwear, lotto has created the tonga Thong to suit your style mantra in all glory. Team this with denims and tees for a cool, casual look.Upper Canvas thong straps with mesh lining for soft, comfort and dry Fit Fabric toe separator for comfort Mesh lining stitched to the thongs straps Midsole Soft, foamy footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Ridged TPR outsole for maximum grip shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
